theme: space radio channels so echoes never stack
title: Two-Scale Echo Suppression — Channel Sets Across a Coarse-Band Chain
strategies: concentrated multiples of the coarse divisor D (baseline, worst on the coarse term)
flat greedy Sidon/B2 construction in Z_M that ignores the coarse term entirely (single-scale optimum, uncontrolled coarse penalty)
CRT lift: a true Sidon set in the large coprime factor M/D combined index-aligned with the provably-optimal balanced residue distribution over Z_D (controls both quotients at once)
further local search on top of the CRT lift, or handling longer subgroup chains D1|D2|...|M (open)
